records.sense_label: see happen typically crime accident
records.english_definition: witness something to see something happen (typically a crime or an accident)
records.japanese_definition: 何かが起こるのを目撃する（通常は犯罪や事故）

records.sense_label: more problems bad news
records.english_definition: more problems or bad news
records.japanese_definition: さらなる問題または悪いニュース

records.sense_label: most serious unpleasant thing could happen
records.english_definition: the most serious or unpleasant thing that could happen
records.japanese_definition: 起こり得る最も深刻な、または不快な出来事

records.sense_label: ten dollars etc amount has value mentioned
records.english_definition: ten dollars’, £40, etc. worth of something an amount of something that has the value mentioned
records.japanese_definition: 10 ドル、40 ポンドなどの価値のあるもの 言及された価値を持つものの金額

records.sense_label: injury part body especially one hole made
records.english_definition: an injury to part of the body, especially one in which a hole is made in the skin using a weapon
records.japanese_definition: 体の一部の損傷、特に武器を使用して皮膚に穴を開けた損傷

records.sense_label: injure part body especially making hole skin
records.english_definition: wound someone or something to injure part of the body, especially by making a hole in the skin using a weapon
records.japanese_definition: 誰かまたは何かに傷を与え、特に武器を使って皮膚に穴を開けることによって、体の一部を傷つけること

records.sense_label: cover completely paper other material example giving
records.english_definition: to cover something completely in paper or other material, for example when you are giving it as a present
records.japanese_definition: 何かを紙や他の素材で完全に覆うこと。たとえばプレゼントとして贈る場合など

records.sense_label: behaviour not honest morally acceptable
records.english_definition: behaviour that is not honest or morally acceptable
records.japanese_definition: 正直ではない、または道徳的に受け入れられない行動

records.sense_label: despite what has just said
records.english_definition: despite what has just been said
records.japanese_definition: 先ほど述べたことにもかかわらず

records.sense_label: area region particular feature use
records.english_definition: an area or a region with a particular feature or use
records.japanese_definition: 特定の特徴や用途を持つ地域や領域
